channel.title: Reverse-Engineering on Joseph Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in Reverse-Engineering on Joseph Carlson

item.title: Ghidra
item.description:
What is Ghidra?

What Can We Do?

Malware Analysis

Reverse Engineering Firmware

Software Security Research

** Learning and Education

Let’s Do It

Lets analyze Wannacry

  • How ransomware encrypts files
  • How a hardcoded kill switch was implemented
  • How the malware utilizes SMB protocol exploit (EternalBlue)
  • Suspicious API calls
  • Obfuscation and malware evasion techniques

VirusShare

Remember

  1. Use a secure isolated VM
  2. Disable networking to prevent unintended spread
  3. Validate hash
  4. Open Ghidra and import malware binary

Sources

  • https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2017/05/the-worm-that-spreads-wanacrypt0r
  • https://blog.talosintelligence.com/wannacry/
